<td><h1>Pull request</h1></td>
</tr></table>

<!--
PR title = GitHub "title" field (not this box): type(scope): description
- type: feat | fix | chore | docs | refactor | ci | test | …
- scope: same word as ticked below when possible
- description: imperative, short, no trailing period
Examples: feat(module): add verify-tfc-token composite · fix(workflow): correct matrix outputs · chore(deps): bump actions/checkout
-->

## Summary

- **What:** …
- **Why:** …
- **Refs:** … *(issues: `Closes #…` / `Refs #…`, or `none`)*

## Scope

- [ ] `infra` — cloud, Terraform, environments, runtime outside the app
- [ ] `workflow` — GitHub Actions (or similar CI/CD YAML)
- [ ] `config` — tooling, linters, editor, build config *(not product logic)*
- [ ] `repo` — org defaults, templates, meta, root `.github`
- [ ] `module` — shared library, composite action, reusable workflow surface
- [ ] `docs` — README, ADR, user-facing copy in-repo
- [ ] `deps` — lockfile, dependency or action version bumps
- [ ] `other` — *(one line: name the scope + why it isn’t any of the above)* …

## Verification

- [ ] CI / automated checks run or are expected to pass
- [ ] Manually verified: …
- [ ] Nothing to run: … *(e.g. docs — `N/A`)*

## Risk / rollback *(if needed)*

*Examples: `none` · `Low — revert this commit; no data migration` · `Consumers must pin past tag until they adopt new input`*

---

## Checklist

- [ ] **Title** = `type(scope): description` *(scope ↔ ticks above)*
- [ ] This PR only — no unrelated edits
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, keys, or private data

---
